user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select a function for the bulk update, so that I can define which employee data attribute I am updating
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Mass update of Employee Data screen; When I select a Function; Then the update can proceed for that function

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to move employees between available and applicable lists using the transfer controls, so that I can choose who the mass update applies to
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Mass update of Employee Data screen; When I use the >>, >, <, and << controls; Then employees move between the available and applicable employees lists

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to apply the update to the selected applicable employees, so that many records are updated in one action
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected a function and applicable employees; When I submit the mass update; Then the chosen data is applied to all selected employees

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to go back from the mass update screen, so that I can cancel or return to the previous page without changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Mass update of Employee Data screen; When I click Back; Then I am returned to the previous page without applying an update
